sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Judiciary Administration Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Judiciary Administration Short title
(Amendment) Act, 2024, and shall be read as one with the Judiciary Act No. 23
Administration Act, 2016, in this Act referred to as the principal of 2016
Act.

sections.heading: Section 23 (2) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
sections.text:
Section 23 (2) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
deletion of paragraph (g). of section 23
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
230
